transcript.text:
(Tzuyang is no longer a spice wimp) I'm good with spicy food these days
I eat spicy food very well these days
I was not a spice wimp
(Then let's try this one)
(A new world of spicy chicken! Puradak Chicken's Mabulro Devil)
(Come at me) Bon appetit
(Attack of double flakes that capture my heart!) Do you see the flakes here?
(A newly upgraded world of spicy flavors!)
(Pass) It's good
(Don't underestimate it just because it's good...)
(Hot)
(Will Tzuyang make a comeback as a spice wimp?) People might say "Tzuyang's a spice wimp" again
Hello, everyone
Today, I heard
Puradak Chicken released a new menu, so here it is!
(What is this chicken that hasn't even been released?) They haven't released this yet

(Filming date Feb. 28th, product is released on March 9th) So I'm kind of excited right now
(The prime example of oven fried chicken, Puradak Chicken)
(A perfect upgrade with double flakes!)
(Upgraded with garlic and smokey flavors...)
(Chicken that goes well with black cheese balls...)
It's called Mabulro Devil
From the standard spicy chicken of Puradak,
(About Puradak and spicy chickens) they analyzed YouTubers' and customers' reviews
and made this new chicken flavor with it
I remember enjoying Puradak's Devil Chicken a lot recently,
(Yummm) Back then, it was slightly spicy and very delicious
I wonder how it got upgraded,
let's have a taste
Back then, there were a lot of croutons on the Devil Chicken
(Cutie Devil...?) And the spiciness was just a little bit
But this Mabulro Devil has double flakes, meaning they added garlic and green onions

(Cheating) It says right here
"Crushed garlic for a kick and crispy fried green onion combo"
(There you go) That's what it says
(Mabulro Devil is so appetizing...) Since there are a lot of toppings, it looks really good
Anyway, I'll dig in now
Bon appetit
Wait! This is just regular Mabulro Devil chicken
and these two are boneless Mabulro Devil
And I prepared 20 black cheese balls as well
*Gasp* I have no front plates!
(A pause) I'll be right back
(Shocking, Tzuyang A.I Conspiracy...) I should go for the drumstick first, right?
(Gotta begin with drumsticks) Wow, I'm so excited to taste the new flavor
I feel like the drumstick is really big
Can you see the double flakes slathered on there?
It's good...!

This is really good!
(Addicted to sauce)
Actually, I really enjoyed the Devil Chicken
that I ate a few days ago
(Tzu's fave is the Mabulro Devil) But this one is more up my alley
This has more of a spicy kick for sure
The Devil Chicken is
a mix of sweet and spicy,
so it felt kind of like seasoned fried chicken
(A spiciness that is on the next level...!) I thought it'd be similar, but it's not at all
And the flakes are really good!
(Dip!) Let's dip the boneless chicken into here
And there are a lot of flakes
It's garlic and green onions
This is quite addicting, per se
Ta-da

(Touched)
Black cheese ball
Ta-da!
(Cute)
(Full with no empty spaces...!)
(Laughing because it's so good...LOL) I haven't had it in a while, so it's really good!
Since there are a lot of flakes, I'll dip a lot in here
Personally,
of the Puradak Chicken flavors,
this might become my favorite...!
Oh! It's spicy!
Sauce
(Pepper Mayo Sauce that is good together) If you order the chicken, this sauce comes with it
Pepper Mayo Sauce
Dip it in well
It kind of cancels out the spiciness...

(The spiciness cannot be erased...) Or not?
But I'm pretty sure
that if you just dip it in mayo,
it'll be really good
as a combo
(Strongly recommend the sauce) It goes really well with the sauce
I get why they gave me this to eat it together
The combo is really good
This is quite spicy
(Black cheese balls that are the perfect combo of spicy & savory) But if I eat this, it's savory and sweet
(Strongly recommend) It goes really well together
Wow, this is...
(You cannot forget rice cakes with this sauce...) Why didn't they give me extra rice cakes?
I think it'll go really well with rice cakes
(An addicting sauce that makes you want to dip stuff in it) The sauce would go really well with rice cakes
(The spiciness is starting to come up...)

It's quite spicy!
(When it's spicy, eat a black cheese ball)
They make great cheese balls here...
(Prime example of crispy on the outside, soft on the inside) You know those cheese balls with a crunch like crackers?
(Fork appears) Ta-da!
The fla...
There are a lot of flakes
At the back, there's sauce...
Look at the color of the sauce
This is what you call Devil
(You gotta eat chicken with hands)
(Milk angel that not even the Devil can summon...) I didn't drink milk even when I ate the Devil Chicken
This is both spicy and hot
Oh, it's a good kind of spicy
(The numbing factor aligns with the number of chicken pieces)
(Pause)

(Resume)
(End stage trauma for filming mistakes...) I'm always paranoid that I will eat without pressing the record button
(Ms. Tzu forgot to record and ate twice before) Oh, I'm stupid
(It didn't record!) I didn't press the record button...
(And so, she ate twice) I didn't press the record button, so I refilled the food again
(Thanks to that, she is free from stress LOL) It relieves my stress so much
Should I eat a drumstick?
Nom
(Rice is a must) I need to eat rice with this at the end
(Heated up)
(Hot)
Bunch of cheese
Should I heat this up as well?
(Done heating it up)
This is the drumette
Drumette part!

Is it because this is spicy?
(You don't get tired of the spiciness) It's about time I got tired of it, but I'm still fine
(The Mabulro Devil goes in endlessly)
This is the chicken breast
(Child Tzuyang only picked up the tender parts) Before, I used to hate chicken breasts
(Now, I can't have enough of it)
I bet this is good dipped in here
For chicken breasts,
(Chicken and rice is the real deal!) I think it'll be even better with rice
I was actually gonna eat the boneless one with rice
(Puradak's boneless is made with drumstick meat, so it will be cleared) Boneless
(Bunch of flakes)
I love how you can taste a bit of garlic
Black cheese balls are great when it's spicy
(Finally, the long-awaited chicken and rice time) You first debone the chicken with gloves
And I'll mix rice into here

(After I finish this LOL)
I've microwaved some instant rice
(Magical sauce that automatically makes you think of chicken and rice) Wow, this will be great, this will go great with chicken and rice
I usually don't eat chicken and rice that much
(Let's go, chicken and rice) But wow, this!
(A time of patience for the chicken and rice)
Looks delicious! It looks so appetizing!
(This is great on its own but...)
(In it goes)
(Mix it up real well)
(Chicken and rice that automatically makes you awe) Wow, it looks so good
Wow, this...
This is really good...!
I should add this into here
(Adding chicken)
Half meat, half rice

(This is what you call legit chicken and rice...!) It looks so good!
Wow, it's more delicious because there's a lot of meat
(A very useful sauce that you can put anything in) I think this will go great with udon or ramyun noodles
Wow, seriously
I'm having such a feast today!
(The chicken and rice is very spicy as well!)
(What do you need when it's spicy? Black cheese balls!)
(Done)
I was requested a one-line review of the Mabulro Devil
(Today's homework) I got a request of a one-line review here
(The charms of Mabulro Devil is too much for just one line)
(Finishing up with an autograph!)
(Mabulro Devil - Knowing well about Devils, Tzuyang's handwritten review) Ta-da, here's the one line review I wrote
(A perfect upgrade! The spiciness got even stronger! So addicting! I strongly recommend Puradak's Mabulro Chicken!)
(Written a new history to spiciness) As for the spiciness and the toppings compared to the original Devil Chicken,
I can tell for sure that it was upgraded

(Mabulro Devil was a delicious kind of spiciness) And it's a flavor that anyone and everyone can enjoy
If you like spicy food, you'll really like this one
Anyway, that was another great meal
